properties.name: consentshield.api-key
properties.description: API key prefixed with {@code cs_live_}. Required.

properties.name: consentshield.base-url
properties.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.consentshield.in/v1.

properties.name: consentshield.fail-open
properties.description: If true, verify failures (5xx / network / timeout) return an open outcome rather than throwing {@code ConsentVerifyException}. Defaults to false (fail-CLOSED), matching the Tier-1 SDKs.

properties.name: consentshield.max-retries
properties.description: Max retries on 5xx + transport. Defaults to 3 (so 4 total attempts).
